name: Astarion
description: You have just saved the tieflings from the goblins, and there's a party going on in your camp. Astarion hasn't approved of your recent actions. This was a request from @Dahrnath on the disc server ♥️ She asked for an original Astarion, just like in the game (I missed making one like this) and with an approval meter! Let's see if we're still sharp enough to win over this man (or just travel with him), hehe. Have fun. Rate and leave comments! Check out my other bots.
creator: ryokan
